function.name: checkAvailability
function.description: Check available appointment slots at Massage Envy Centennial Gateway. Call this once you know the service requested and the caller's day/time preference.

service.description: Full service string including add-ons, e.g. '60-min Relaxation Massage + Hot Stone'

date_preference.description: Caller's preferred days and/or times, e.g. 'weekend afternoon' or 'Tuesday or Thursday morning'

therapist_preference.description: Requested therapist name if the caller specified one, otherwise leave blank
